sub_modules.conv1d_tap_packer: Packs the current sample and four delayed samples into a fixed 5-tap window bus.
sub_modules.conv1d_weighted_products: Applies the hardcoded FIR coefficients [2, 8, 12, 8, 2] to the packed tap samples.
sub_modules.conv1d_mac5: Combinationally sums the five weighted products using the required MAC width.
sub_modules.conv1d_normalize: Right-shifts the MAC result by GAIN_W to produce the extended-width filtered output.
